name: Sticks 247 Golf
address: 400 Toney Penna Dr STE B, Jupiter, FL 33458
about: Sticks 247 Golf is an indoor golf performance studio in Jupiter, FL, featuring state-of-the-art Trackman IO simulators and Quintic putting analysis technology. The venue offers year-round access to over 400 golf courses in 4K realism, catering to players seeking improvement through detailed shot data, AI swing analysis, and performance training. Membership-based access includes amenities like a lounge, bar area, and private lockers, with a focus on providing a premium, technology-driven environment for dedicated golfers.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to Trackman's professional-grade performance software used by tour players
Quintic Ball Roll Technology for precise putting analysis and immediate consistency feedback
24/7 availability with a luxury atmosphere including lounge, bar, and private member lockers
Ability to play over 400 iconic global courses in stunning 4K realism
